_readme: Tune each object's pass here, then rebuild (npm run build) or save while `npm run dev` runs.
ANGLES ARE IN DEGREES. fit = on-screen size; depth = metres in front of the camera (bigger = smaller/further).
face = [pitch, yaw, bank] tilt. roll = extra spin in the screen plane (kept facing the camera).
GAP-SWEEP objects (about/projects/experience) set 'side': 'left' or 'right'. The object rides centered in the empty
gap between that side of the screen and the section's content. It sweeps in from its edge, dwells briefly in the gap
when the section is centered (the tab-click position), then sweeps across to the far edge as the section scrolls away.
The manhole (contact) keeps the older fixed path: entry/mid/exit are NDC and 'phase' shifts the timing.
The 'hero' entry has no object on purpose.
